items.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
items.lead_paragraph: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.lead_paragraph: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.lead_paragraph: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.lead_paragraph: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

items.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
items.lead_paragraph: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

items.title: Introducing computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash
DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions
Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
Introducing the FFASR Leaderboard: Benchmarking ASR in the Real World
Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
Experimenting with the proposed Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js
Anthropic's core views on AI safety
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: AI progress may lead to transformative AI systems in the next decade, but we do not yet understand how to make such systems safe and aligned with human values. In response, we are pursuing a variety of research directions aimed at better understanding, evaluating, and aligning AI systems.

items.title: Introducing Claude Corps
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America.

items.title: DXC integrates Claude into systems regulated industries rely on
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is announcing a multi-year global alliance with DXC Technology, one of the world’s largest IT services companies.

items.title: TCS and Anthropic bring Claude to regulated industries
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is announcing a partnership with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS). TCS will provide Claude to 50,000 of its own employees across 56 countries; build Claude-powered products for clients in financial services, healthcare, the public sector, and other regulated industries; and join the Claude

items.title: Anthropic partners with the Gates Foundation
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is partnering with the Gates Foundation to commit $200 million in grant funding, Claude usage credits, and technical support for programs in global health, life sciences, education, and economic mobility over the next four years.

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic opens in Seoul and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem.

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
